title: ReCraft
description: ReCraft is a Minecraft plugin that lets you disassemble crafted items into their original components. Say goodbye to wasted resources from mistakes or re-mining! With ReCraft, manage your inventory efficiently and use every resource to its fullest.
body:
**ReCraft is an innovative plugin for Minecraft that allows you to disassemble crafted items back into their original components. Forget about losing resources when crafting incorrectly or having to re-mine them! With ReCraft, you can effectively manage your inventory and maximize the use of each resource.**

**What Does ReCraft Add?**

ReCraft does not add new items to the game, but significantly expands the functionality of the existing workbench. Now your workbench becomes not only a tool for creating, but also for disassembling objects.

**Key Functions:**

Intuitive Disassembly: Simply place any crafted object in any cell of the workbench. Then, click on the empty window of the finished item (where the crafting result usually appears), and the components from which this item was created will instantly appear in your inventory. For example, by disassembling an Iron Pickaxe, you will receive 3 iron ingots and 2 sticks!

Full Support for Vanilla Items: The plugin supports disassembly of all standard Minecraft items, allowing you to efficiently recycle and reuse resources from any crafted vanilla item.

Built-in Help: The /recraft help command will provide you with short and clear instructions on how to use the plugin right in the game, making ReCraft accessible even for beginners.

Multilingual: The plugin supports multiple languages (Russian, English, and "Chinese") with the ability to configure in the config.yml file, providing convenience for a wide audience.

**Why Should I Download ReCraft?**

ReCraft will become an indispensable tool for any Minecraft player striving for efficiency and saving resources.

Saving Resources: You no longer have to worry about accidentally crafting an item or having to re-mine valuable resources. ReCraft allows you to return most of the spent materials.

Inventory Optimization: Quickly disassemble unnecessary crafted items, freeing up space in your inventory and chests.

Flexibility in Crafting: Experiment with crafting without fear of losing resources. If something goes wrong, just disassemble the item and use the components for something else.

Easy to Use: The intuitive interface and built-in help make ReCraft incredibly easy to learn and use.

**_With ReCraft, your Minecraft gaming experience will be smoother, more economical, and more enjoyable. Try it out and find out how much easier it will be to manage your resources!_**
